llm.summary: Task 091 reads as complete in substance. The owner workbench preview and published note page both render from the same shared `renderMarkdownToHtml` path, the workbench math helpers still insert raw `$...$` and `$$...$$` markdown rather than creating a second document model, and the verification tranche now includes unit coverage, targeted E2E coverage with snapshots, and startup-smoke assertions for legacy published-note math. The non-state diff is confined to task-relevant files, so I did not find residual queue drift that should block promotion.
satisfied_exit_criteria: Owner preview and published note pages use the same renderer and cover both inline `$...$` and block `$$...$$` math from one markdown source.
The note workbench stays markdown-native while exposing the shipped inline and block math helpers in the compact toolbar.
Regression protection is present across unit tests, targeted E2E tests, snapshots, and startup-smoke checks for the shipped math surfaces.
The required contract recorded for this task passed: `npm run test:e2e -- --grep @ui-note-math`, `npm run test:e2e -- --grep @ui-public-note-math`, and `npm run verify`.
